name: @clearline/domain-profile
description: Pure, framework-agnostic personal-profile rules for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-034): the notification catalogue (which types exist, how they read, which support a frequency selector) with its default preferences and bulk-summary application, avatar validation (MIME allowlist, 5 MB max, 256px minimum) with user-facing messages, and email-change policy (24h TTL, normalization, same-address rejection). No data-access or UI dependencies.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-034 Personal Profile & Notification Preferences).
